identity_preservation: Candidate attempted the same prediction-service-risk-model field identity without redefining the serving interface.
precheck_results: data validation gate passed before canary
schema validation gate passed before canary
serving integration gate passed before canary
qualification_evidence: model quality check passed before canary
monitor trigger coverage existed for data drift, schema drift, model quality, serving latency, and regression floor
regression_results: baseline regression floor failed during model canary monitor
serving latency regression stayed within threshold
authority_check: candidate stayed within the same authority ceiling and did not expand prediction-service action rights
evaluator_independence: Independent model rollout review marked the monitor failure and owns the rollback decision.
residual_escrow: residual: failed model canary monitor event preserved for later review
residual: irreversible logged prediction traces remain external-effect audit material
rollback_plan: Rollback to impl://risk-model-v1 by restoring the model alias and setting candidate canary route weight to zero.

irreversible_effects: logged prediction traces from failed canary remain irreversible external effects for audit

canary_scope: model canary stopped after monitor trigger
monitor_window: fixture monitor failed for data schema model serving regression signals
promotion_blockers: irreversible logged prediction effects preserved as residual
non_claims: does not prove runtime model rollback behavior
does not prove production model rollout
